summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 20 warning, 13 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:12-78` — Hand-rolled YAML parser handles only flat schema; track replacement or document supported subset if schema complexity grows
🟡 `tasks/task-2/handshake.json:7` — Handshake claims "614/614" tests; recorded artifact shows 551 tests / 549 pass; claims must match evidence
🟡 `SPEC.md:36-53` — Spec schema (`pattern`/`keywords`/`threshold`) diverges from shipped schema (`patterns`/`minScore`); update SPEC to prevent confusion

🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:213` — `scoreRunbook` crashes on null/undefined description (`description.toLowerCase()` throws TypeError). Unreachable from current call site but the function is exported. Add `if (!description) return 0;` guard.
🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:437` — Runbook `flow` field is loaded and stored but never consumed downstream. Dead data. Either wire it or remove from schema.
🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:234` — Tie-break uses `rb.id` but SPEC says "alphabetically by filename". Diverges when id !== filename.
🟡 `tasks/task-2/handshake.json:7` — Handshake claims "614/614 tests" but artifact shows 551 tests (549 pass, 2 skip); fix handshake accuracy to match artifact evidence
🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:441` — `hint` field is dead-end data: propagated through 3 functions but never shown to the executing agent; wire into `buildTaskBrief`
🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:188` — `flow` field loaded but never consumed by `planTasks` or flow selection; wire or remove from schema
🟡 `SPEC.md:34-53` — Spec diverged from implementation (`pattern`/`keywords`/`threshold` vs `patterns`/`minScore`) without update; spec is misleading for runbook authors
🟡 `test/runbooks.test.mjs` — No integration test for `planTasks()` → runbook code path; highest-risk untested seam in the feature
🟡 `test/`:missing — No test file for `add-test-suite.yml` runbook; SPEC AC #3 unverified by automation
🟡 `test/runbooks.test.mjs` — No integration test for `planTasks()` runbook path at `run.mjs:418-452`; highest-risk untested seam
🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:213` — `scoreRunbook` crashes on null/undefined description; guard with `String(description ?? "")`
🟡 `test/runbooks.test.mjs` — `--runbook nonexistent` fallthrough untested (SPEC AC #8)

🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:110` — `isSafeRegex` heuristic bypassed by overlapping alternation patterns. **Confirmed:** `(a|a)+$` hangs for 4351ms on 25-char input while the guard doesn't detect it. Must upgrade to library-based check (e.g., `safe-regex2`) before loading runbooks from untrusted sources.
🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:213` — `scoreRunbook` crashes on null/undefined `description` with unhelpful TypeError. Add `if (!description) return 0;` at function entry.

🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:84` — `stripInlineComment` silently corrupts regex patterns containing literal ` #`. **Confirmed:** `value: foo #bar` loads as `"foo"`. Quoted values are safe, but no documentation warns authors to quote patterns with `#`.
**Verdict: PASS** — No 🔴 critical findings. No veto categories triggered.
🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:188` — `flow` field loaded but never consumed downstream — wire or remove

🟡 `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:207` — Double ReDoS guard (`isSafeRegex` at load-time line 158 AND score-time line 207); runtime check unreachable in current code — remove duplicate or document defensive intent
